master_row.title: Emergent Gravity from Coherence Restoration
master_row.canonical_statement: Particles, as defects, create gradients in the coherence field; these gradients produce an attractive potential that can be formalized by Poisson's equation; gravity is an emergent entropic force rather than a fundamental interaction.
master_row.formation_note: Documented in the source as a differential equation relating π, ρ, G_, G.
